analysisSummary: Confirmed by re-reading the stdin handling in cmd/goyoke-scout/main.go and the file collection path in cmd/goyoke-scout/native_scout.go. Piped file-list mode widened the scan to the common parent directory instead of honoring the exact file set.
suggestedFix: Carry the explicit stdin file list through runScout into NativeScout and collect metrics from those exact files.

analysisSummary: Confirmed by tracing the permission cache writer in cmd/goyoke-permission-gate/cache.go against the session-end cleanup in cmd/goyoke-archive/main.go. The writer hashes session IDs, but cleanup still targeted the pre-hash filename format.
suggestedFix: Use the same sha256(sessionID) filename derivation during archive cleanup and align the regression test with the hashed cache path.
